title: General Medicine (Lechebnoye Delo) — Specialist Degree
medium: English-medium international track with a Russian-language component (WDOMS lists both Russian and English as languages of instruction)
feeNotes: Official gm.unn.ru page lists 410,000 RUB/year for the General Medicine programme; an older archived version of eng.unn.ru cited 240,000 RUB/year, so fees have risen over time — confirm the current-year figure directly with UNN admissions before relying on either number.

title: General Medicine (Lechebnoye Delo) — Specialist Degree
medium: Russian, with a reported (consultancy-sourced, not independently confirmed on an official page) English-medium international track since 2016

title: General Medicine (Lechebnoye Delo) — Specialist Degree
medium: Russian (with a Russian-as-a-Foreign-Language preparatory track for international students; not English-medium despite some consultancy marketing claims)
